label: lee-gamma-frontier
headline_statement: Partial verdict: Assumptions~\ref{ass:random-consistency}--\ref{ass:interior} imply the sharp common-\(\alpha\) frontier displayed in Conjecture~\ref{conj:lee-gamma-frontier}; the additional open-set non-representability assertions relative to external comparator geometries are not confirmed by the finite-table assumptions alone.
gap_if_partial: The fragment proves the sharp common-alpha identified set, endpoint attainment by a four-stratum law, and the endpoint optimizer characterization. It does not prove the broad open-set non-representability claims against the cited external comparator geometries, because those comparators are not defined in the shared setup as explicit feasible sets or support functions on the same finite-table input space.
